title: Can we have a Dashboard that is the default screen when opening Monday.com
excerpt: We have implemented a sales pipeline through Monday.com and it would be great to have the dashboard for that as the default screen for the team when they open Monday.com.  Is this or can this be done please?

posts.author: Sonjak (Sonja King)
posts.cookedHtml: We have implemented a sales pipeline through Monday.com and it would be great to have the dashboard for that as the default screen for the team when they open Monday.com. Is this or can this be done please?
